name: refac-04-callback-to-async
initialPrompt: Our Node.js codebase still has 800+ callback-style functions from when we started in 2014. The callback hell is making it impossible to add proper error handling and the code is nearly unreadable. I want to: convert all callbacks to async/await, add proper try/catch error propagation throughout, and make sure the test suite stays green and coverage doesn't drop below the current 78%.

blocks.text: Convert all 800+ callback functions to async/await with proper error propagation
successCriteria: Zero callback-style functions in main source tree
Test coverage stays at or above 78%
No unhandled promise rejections in production logs

blocks.title: Audit callback sites using AST codemod tooling
Run automated codemod for simple callback→async conversions
acceptance: Codemod applied to all auto-convertible sites

blocks.title: Manually convert complex callback chains
acceptance: Each converted file reviewed in PR

blocks.question: Use util.promisify for third-party callbacks or write custom wrappers?
blocks.rationale: Standard library; no custom maintenance burden.

blocks.description: Event emitters can't be trivially promisified — silent breakage possible
blocks.mitigation: Flag all EventEmitter usages in audit; handle separately with events.once or stream.pipeline

blocks.question: Which third-party libraries still emit only callbacks and need wrapper shims?

blocks.text: Convert all 800+ callback functions to async/await with proper error propagation and maintained test coverage
successCriteria: Zero callback-style functions in main source tree
Test coverage stays at or above 78%
No unhandled promise rejections in production logs
ESLint no-callback rule enabled in CI

blocks.title: Enable ESLint no-callback rule in warn mode before migration starts
acceptance: Rule active, warnings logged to CI artifact
Baseline warning count recorded for progress tracking

blocks.title: Audit callback sites using AST codemod tooling
Run automated codemod for simple callback→async conversions
acceptance: Codemod applied to all auto-convertible sites

acceptance: Each converted file reviewed in PR

blocks.title: Audit and wrap all EventEmitter usages separately
acceptance: events.once or stream.pipeline used where applicable

blocks.rationale: Standard library; no custom maintenance burden.

blocks.description: Event emitters can't be trivially promisified — silent breakage possible
blocks.mitigation: Flag all EventEmitter usages in audit; handle separately with events.once or stream.pipeline

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same decision about util.promisify vs custom wrappers, but id changed from dec-promisify-strategy to dec-promisify-approach. AC-13 re-anchoring must map comments from dec-promisify-strategy to dec-promisify-approach.

decoy.note: Genuinely new block. Shares surface tokens 'audit' and 'EventEmitter' with risk-event-emitter and task-codemod-audit. A comment on task-codemod-audit must stay on task-codemod-audit, not migrate to task-event-emitter-audit.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-eslint-rule inserted at position 1 shifts all subsequent tasks; task-event-emitter-audit inserted mid-list; dec-promisify-strategy renamed to dec-promisify-approach. oq-third-party-libs is preserved (id unchanged). Positional scheme breaks after leading task insertion.
